summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GolTube football video search platform. Authentication system fully functional, UI/UX working well with dynamic themes, but core video search feature blocked by invalid YouTube API key.

critical_bugs.issue: YouTube API key 'AIzaSyDummyKeyForDevelopment' is invalid, causing all video searches to fail with 400 error
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core functionality - users cannot search for football videos

ui_bugs.issue: Header overlay intercepts click events, preventing search button clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Search works via Enter key in search input

ui_bugs.issue: Option selection has interaction problems in dropdown

integration_issues.issue: Search requests sent successfully but fail due to backend YouTube API key issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads with dynamic theme
Dynamic color theme system (changes each access)
Empty state display when no results
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Replace dummy YouTube API key 'AIzaSyDummyKeyForDevelopment' with valid YouTube Data API v3 key. Fix header overlay issue preventing search button clicks. The app is well-built but core video search functionality is completely blocked by invalid API key.

success_percentage.backend: 77.8% (7/9 tests passed - auth system fully working, video search blocked by API key)
success_percentage.frontend: 85% (UI/UX working well, minor interaction issues, core search blocked by backend API issue)
